film.title: McFarland, USA
film.overview: A track coach in a small California town transforms a team of athletes into championship contenders.

dialogues.dialogue: and better shoes.   Why you buy them  the cheap shoes?   You're not proud of them?     Hmm?  You are a good man and so I helping you.
Okay.     My family.  You must be very proud.    Hmm.   How old are your daughters,  Senor Blanco?
I hope you know how much    you mean to me, and how      being your dad and Jamie's,   makes me prouder  than you'll ever know.    And how I hope to one day     make you proud, too.
makes me prouder  than you'll ever know.    And how I hope to one day     make you proud, too.    As proud...   As proud   as these kids are    As proud   as these kids are
